data.body:
Direction update for initial sequencing:

1. `skogai-routing` is the first and most important skill in the moved set. It should be treated as the canonical router and starting point for skill-related input, tools, and workflows.
2. `skills/skill-creator/` should be treated as the official external Claude/Codex skill creator and removed from this repo-local set for now.
3. `skills/skogai-skill-creator/` is an older setup and can also be removed.
4. `skills/skogai-skills/` is better understood as an earlier routing-led skill-creation setup, not a separate canonical endpoint.

Operational implication: perfect `skogai-routing` first, then review and simplify the remaining skills around that canonical path.

issue.title: epic: review and normalize repo-local skills/ after move from core
